titleStmt.title: SII 25.58: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 58. (A.R. No. 58 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.
This epigraph may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to about the 12th century A.D.

It records the gift of paddy from out of the dēvadāṉa lands like Poṉṉiēndal at Puravarinallūr, the income from taxes such as śīkāriyappēṟu, kāttigai-kāśu, taṟiiṟai from the maḍaiviḷāgam lands, etc., for food-offerings and services (tiruppaṇi) to the deity Tiruvayaṉīchcharam-uḍaiyār of Vaḻugūr in Irambēḍu-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam by Śeṅgēṇi Vīrarākkidas-śambuvarāya, who styles himself ‘a Pallavaṉ’.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kulottuṅ coḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 7āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻama
ṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu Irumpeṭunāṭṭu vaḻukūr tiruvayaṉiccaramuṭaiyārkku ceṅkeṇi virarākkitac cam
puvarāyaṉeṉ puravari nallūr poṉṉi Ental Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa tevatāṉattil kaṇkāṇi mā nellu cikāriyap peṟu kāt
tikai kācu maṭaiviḷākattil taṟi Iṟai Eppeṟpaṭṭa Āyaṅkaḷ Innāyaṉā(r)kku tiruppaṇi Amutupaṭikku kuṭutteṉ
pallavaṉ virarākkitac campuvarāyaṉeṉ Ittaṉmam vilakkuvāṉ keṅkai Iṭaicetār pāvam koḷvāṉ
Ittaṉmam Iṟakkuvāṉ
Digital edition of SII 25.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
